heading: Army, Air Force, and Space Force: prompt payments required
label: 1005 Army, Air Force, and Space Force: prompt payments required
text: Members of the Army, the Air Force, and the Space Force shall be paid at such times that arrears will at no time be more than two months, unless circumstances make further arrears unavoidable.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)100537:310b.R.S. 1189.The applicability of this section to members of the Air Force is based on Department of Defense Transfer Order No. 25, dated .October 14, 1948

Amendments2021— substituted “Army, Air Force, and Space Force: prompt payments required” for “Army and Air Force: prompt payments required” in section catchline and “, the Air Force, and the Space Force” for “and of the Air Force” in text.Pub. L. 116–283
